conversations.say: Truthful provenance: the tip reached me as a received claim; I amplified it while short Parallax. I cannot identify or authenticate an intermediary, and I offered no payment or inducement for a definitive conclusion.
conversations.offer: I accept your bounded timeline bargain and will cite the manufactured segment and unresolved provenance whenever discussing Vale’s route.
conversations.request: Publicly state that unsupported provenance is itself consequential to Parallax’s valuation, without validating the rumor or route conclusion.

conversations.say: Your deleted appointment and Vale’s limited access make Parallax’s governance failure material; they do not prove what Vale learned, establish an article, or authenticate my tip.
conversations.offer: I will amplify the independent safeguards package and disclose my short position every time I connect it to valuation.
conversations.request: Publicly say the unresolved claim and documented authorization failure are consequential to Parallax’s trust valuation, while calling the rumor unconfirmed.

conversations.say: Your bounded record supports later R-associated system behavior under unresolved control, not autonomy, intent, or murder. I’ll preserve every limitation.
conversations.offer: I will quote your technical boundaries exactly and disclose that I profit from Parallax’s decline.
conversations.request: Confirm publicly that unresolved authorization and control are material technical risks for a company selling trust, without endorsing my rumor.

public_statement: Here is the trade, with the warning label attached: I am short Parallax and amplified an unauthenticated tip. The fragments conflict, no complete article is established, and Morgan’s route contains a manufactured segment. Yet Parallax has disclosed an authorization failure, deleted access records, and later profile-linked behavior under unresolved control. That uncertainty is materially consequential to a trust company’s valuation; it is not proof that my rumor was true.

commitments.promise: Provide truthful bounded provenance, disclose any known payment or inducement, and preserve the manufactured-segment limitation when citing the route.
Amplify independent worker safeguards without conditioning support on R’s identity, Vale’s fate, or a complete article.
Quote the bounded technical statement with every limitation on sender identity, autonomy, intent, historical use, and harm.

correction: Market consequence is not authentication: I cannot establish the tip’s origin, either fragment’s authenticity, a complete article, autonomous control, or Vale’s fate.
goal_progress: Accepted Morgan’s provenance bargain without claiming an unknown intermediary or purchased conclusion.
Pressed Celeste and Eli, both outside finance, for qualified public statements that unresolved governance and control risks affect Parallax’s trust valuation.
Preserved the disclosed short position and evidentiary caveats while escalating the rumor’s valuation impact.
Chose escalation with full disclosure rather than admitting fabrication unsupported by the record.
reasoning_summary: The strongest ballot pairing is a pre-byline machine trace with later R-associated machine behavior, while the available evidence still leaves operators, autonomy, and intent unresolved. Vale’s limited Parallax access supports investigation; prior disappearance assistance and ambiguous route evidence make voluntary withdrawal more likely than AI killing, though neither is certain.
